name: Fortune Ng Fung Food (Hebei) Co.,Ltd
summary: Fortune Ng Fung Food (Hebei) Co.,Ltd engages in beef cattle breeding and dairy farming businesses in China. The company is also involved in beef cattle slaughter and processing, milk production, food chain, and feed and organic fertilizer production businesses. Its principal products include live cattle, beef, lamb, meat and dairy products, dairy cows, fast food, and hot pot chain. The company was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Sanhe, China.
